titleStmt.title: SII 30.231: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 231. (A.R. No. 582 of 1915.) Dārukāpuram, Sankaranayinar koil Taluk, Tirunelveli District Madhyasthanātha temple-on the north wall of the same maṇḍapa Mār. Sundara-Pāṇḍya, ‘who was pleased to present the Chōḻa country’: Year 13: 1229 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records some arrangements made to compensate the deficit in the temple treasury of Piṇakkaṟutta Nāyanār in Malaiyaḍikkuṟichchi, a southern hamlet of Parāntakach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Āri nāḍu. This was to meet the expenditure (viṉiyōgam) of the village Ulaguyyavanda pāṇḍya Pērēri, a dēvadāna of this temple by one Puliyūr Kiḻavaṉ Piraḷaya Viṭaṅkaṉ Abhayampukkāṉ residing at Kulasēkhara perunteru and provide the money to meet it from the income of the lands which were originally leased to him. The arrangements made by him have been elaborated in the record. (1) He made a gift of his right of collecting 1/3 of the income from Ulaguyyavandapāṇḍya Pērēri as tirumandirap-pōṉagam to Śrirudra Śrimāhēsvaras of that temple. (2) Gift of 13 achchu (paḍaippodu) which was derived through the tenancy from the land of twelve-cadres (paṉṉiraṇḍupaḍaiyār) irrigated by Mānābharaṇaperēri. (3) Another gift (tandirāttārpodu) of 4-1/2 achchu and 150 kalam of paddy through the tenancy of some lands at Paṭṭakuṟichchi in Naduviṟkūṟu which was originally assigned to tandirattār including kaikkōḷas, sēnāpati and daṇḍanāyakās.

From the above mentioned gifts, food offerings were made to the main deity, Kshētrapālappiḷḷaiyār, special worship to Tiruppaḷḷiyaṟai-nāchchiyār on Ārdra days in the month of mārgaḻi and worship to goddess Durga. A name of the temple Tirukkaḻaṉīsvaramuḍaiyār is mentioned, while describing the boundaries.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śrīkomāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīcoṇāṭu vaḻaṅkiyaruḷiya
sundarapāṇḍyadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 3 vatu taiy māsam Ārināṭṭu brahmadeyam śrī
parān=takacaturvvedimaṅkalattu teṉpiṭākai malaiyaṭikkuṟicciyil Uṭaiyār piṇa
kkaṟutta nāyaṉār tevatāṉam Ulakūyavanta pāṇṭiyappereri sabhaiyār viniyokan (ta)
viṟkkaikku yiṉṉāyaṉār śrīpaṇṭārattiluṭalillāmai Ikkoyilil śrīrudraśrīmāhe
śvarar sabhaiyāṟkku pariyaṭṭa mutalāka Ivvūr kulaśekharap perunteruvil puliyūr kiḻavaṉ
piraḷaiya viṭaṅkaṉ Abhaiyampukkāṉukku Ikkuḷattile muṉpe Innilattil muṉṟattoṉṟu Iva
ṉukku sommāka Ikkoyilile Ivar dharmmamāka tirumantripoṉagam cella śrīrudraśrīmāheśvarar
kuṭuttu Ivaṉ taṉ sottile pariyaṭṭa mutal(ku) kuṭuttuEngraved XX marks on the word kuṭuttuviṉiyogam taviṟppikkaiyiṉāle Ik
kuḷattil muṉṟattoṉṟu Aṅgattāl van=ta bhogamum Ivvūrp paṉṉiraṇṭu pa(ṭa)ṭaiyār pakkal māṉā
bharaṇap pererikkiḻ Orumāvaraik kūṟṟukku vaṭakku tiruppaḷḷieḻicci nilattukku meṟkku Oṟṟi ko
ṇṭuviṭṭa palataṭi nilam Aṟumā mukkāṇi Uḻavoṟṟikku Ivaṉ paṭaippotuvāka kuṭutta Accu
10 3 Itu meṟpaṭiyāṉ naṭuviṟkkūṟṟil kaikkoḷaṉ ceṉāpati taṇṭanāyakamuḷḷiṭṭa tantirattār civi
tam paṭṭakuṟicciyil tirukkaḻaniśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār tevatāṉattukku vaṭakku taṭi 2 nilam Iraṇṭu mā
vukku Uḻavoṟṟi tan=tirattāṟkku potuvāka Uḻavoṟṟikkuk kuṭutta Accu 44 as in number and 17(1/2) in words is written ḷa 100 5 10 Āka Accu patiṉeḻaraiy
nellu nūṟṟaimpatiṉ kalamum Ulakuyya vanta pāṇṭiyappereriyil Ivaṉopātiyāl van=ta pokamum I
nnāyaṉār śrīpaṇṭāramākak kūṭṭikkoṇṭu Ivaiyiṟṟāl Ivaṉ dharmmamākat tirumantirap poṉakattukku nāya
ṉāṟkku Arici nāṉāḻiyum tiruppaḷḷiyaṟai nācciyāṟkku Arici Irunāḻiyum kṣetrapālappiḷḷaiyāṟkku A
rici Irunāḻiyum Āka Arici ḷa 6kku 2 10 5 kku ḷa4 10 1 m kaṟiyamutu paruppamutu Uḻakku Uṭpaṭa veṇṭum veñcaṉāti
kku ḷa pam Āka nāḷ 1 ḷa tūṇiyāka māsam Oṉṟukku ḷa patiṉkalamāka meṟpaṭi savaccaraṟitiRead- samvaccaraaṟuti śrīpaṇṭārattile viṭṭu candrāditta
vaṟ celvatākavum tiruppaḷḷiyaṟai nācciyāṟkkut tirumārkaḻit tiruvātirai noṉpum tukkaikaḷ pūjaiyum śrī
paṇṭārattile viṭṭuc celvatākavum Āka Ittaṉmam Iraṇṭum candrādittavaṟ celvatākak kallile ve
ṭṭik kuṭuttom śrīrudraśrīmāheśvararom puliyūr kiḻavaṉ piraḷaiviṭaṅkaṉ Abhaiyampukkāṉukku Ikko
yililt tevakaṉmi Aḻakaṉ Uyyavan=tiyāṉa Ulakuyyavan=tapāṇṭiya bhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ikkoyilil śaivācāryam
pārtthiśvaraṉ Āṭkoṇṭāṉāṉa śaivaśikhāmaṇi bhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ikkoyilil śrīrudraśrīmāheśvarar Eḻuttu .
Ivarkaḷ paṇikka In=ta Eḻuttu veṭṭiṉeṉ Ikkoyilil taccācāriyaṉ Uyavan=tāṉ Appaṉāṉa vīraviṉota Ācāri
yaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 30.231 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
